metadata.title: Honor of Kings (王者荣耀) to Arena of Valor / Liên Quân Mobile Hero Mapping
metadata.description: Comprehensive skill comparison mapping between HOK/VGVD and AOV/LQ heroes from TiMi Studios

game_versions.hok: Honor of Kings / 王者荣耀 / Vương Giả Vinh Diệu
game_versions.aov: Arena of Valor / Liên Quân Mobile

metadata.note: Similarity scores based on skill mechanics, not visual/name similarity. Many heroes share core mechanics but have different names, and some have same names but different playstyles due to separate development.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Skill hits reduce enemy Magic Defense by 36-72 points, stacking up to 3 times for 3 seconds
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Skill hits reduce enemy Magic Defense, stacking mechanic (similar effect)
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical passive mechanism - both reduce magic defense when skills hit
skill_comparison.difference: Slight variation in damage reduction numbers

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Shockwave dealing 570-895 (+120% Magic Power) magic damage in specified direction
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar shockwave projectile dealing magic damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Core mechanism identical - directional magic damage projectile
skill_comparison.difference: Scaling and damage values may differ

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Lock onto enemy, throw charming heart dealing 285-460 (+66% Magic Power) magic damage and stunning for 1.5 seconds
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar lockable stun ability with charm mechanics
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical lockable stun with damage component
skill_comparison.difference: Visual execution differs but mechanical effect is the same

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Release 5 foxfires dealing 325-485 (+75% Magic Power) magic damage each, with subsequent foxfires dealing 50% damage if multiple hit same target
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Multi-projectile ultimate with area damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Both use multi-projectile ultimate with diminishing returns on stacking
skill_comparison.difference: Number and pattern of projectiles may vary

mappings.overall_notes: 妲己/Veera are nearly identical heroes - same charm/mage playstyle with magic defense reduction passive. Both are seductive mage characters with crowd control and burst damage. 92% skill similarity makes them nearly perfect counterparts.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: After using skill, next basic attack dashes to target dealing 475 (+100% AD) physical damage with 20% crit rate and benefits from crit bonuses
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar - after ability use, next attack transforms to powerful dash dealing 330 (+14/level) (+1.0 AD) physical damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Both feature skill-to-autoattack empowerment with dash component
skill_comparison.difference: HOK version has crit-focused scaling, AOV version emphasizes movement

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Block enemy skill for up to 1.5 seconds, gaining 0.2s invincibility and shield absorbing 500-1000 (+150% AD) (+15% extra HP) damage for 4 seconds if successful block
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Makes himself invisible and gains 40% movement speed for 1 second with armor/magic defense buff
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are defensive/mobility skills with similar activation patterns
skill_comparison.difference: HOK is reactive blocking defense, AOV is proactive stealth mobility - MAJOR mechanical difference

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Dash in direction, if hitting target leaps into air gaining 90% decaying movement speed for 1 second
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Becomes invisible for 1 second, gains 40% movement speed, falls in direction with 100-200 armor/magic defense buff for 3 seconds
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are dashing mobility skills with movement speed components
skill_comparison.difference: HOK conditional on hitting enemy, AOV provides duration invisibility

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Thrust Golden Cudgel dealing 250-500 (+80% AD) physical damage, knocking enemies up for 1 second, applying 3 mark layers. Basic attacks on marked enemies consume marks dealing additional 270-540 physical damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Release inner Chi, nearby enemies take 150-230 (+0.5 AD) physical damage and stun for 1 second. Can reuse within 5 seconds to vanish with 40% movement speed buff
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are AoE knockout crowd control ultimates
skill_comparison.difference: HOK focuses on mark stacking for sustained damage, AOV has dual-cast with mobility reset

mappings.overall_notes: Wukong heroes share monkey-themed fighter gameplay but mechanics have diverged significantly. HOK version is more crit-oriented with reactive blocking, AOV version emphasizes stealth and mobility. ~75% similar with significant playstyle differences due to separate development paths.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Dual-wielding mode increases movement speed by 40 points. Damage marks targets with Mark of the Blade lasting 5 seconds, stackable. At 5 stacks targets take 200% of AD physical damage, get silenced 1 second, and move 80% slower
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Same mechanic - marks from damage attacks, stacking effect at high marks
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical mark stacking passive with same 5-stack threshold effect
skill_comparison.difference: Minor wording/implementation differences only

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Engage dual-wielding increasing attack damage and gaining new abilities while in mode
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Transform between dual-wield and merged blade forms, each with different abilities and attack patterns
skill_comparison.similarity: Both feature fundamental stance-switching mechanic
skill_comparison.difference: Implementation details and resulting move set changes vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Projectile attack changing based on stance - different effects in dual-wield vs merged mode
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Stance-dependent attack ability with mechanical variation
skill_comparison.similarity: Both attacks vary based on character's current stance
skill_comparison.difference: Specific projectile patterns and damage calculations differ

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate that deals massive physical damage with AOE effect, can trigger blade combination for enhanced damage in specific stance
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Ultimate sweep attack dealing high physical damage with extended AOE
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates are sweeping multi-target physical damage abilities
skill_comparison.difference: Damage scaling and secondary effects vary between versions

mappings.overall_notes: 花木兰/Yena are nearly identical dual-wielding fighters. Both feature stance-switching mechanics and mark stacking passive. The dual-weapon system is fundamental to both heroes. ~88% similarity with minor mechanical variations between versions.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Gain temporary invincibility windows after ability usage, dodge incoming damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Gain invincibility and dodge mechanics through temporal abilities
skill_comparison.similarity: Both feature dodge/invincibility mechanics as core passive
skill_comparison.difference: Implementation and trigger conditions vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ranged sword attack dealing physical damage in cone area
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Primary damage dealing skill with projectile component
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are basic ranged damage skills
skill_comparison.difference: Area of effect and damage scaling differs

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Mobility dash with invincibility window during animation
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Teleport/dash ability that grants temporary invincibility making Murad invincible during dodge
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are dash abilities with invincibility/dodge component
skill_comparison.difference: Duration and range of invincibility protection varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate with large AoE damage and crowd control, potential for high burst damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Ultimate ability that creates temporal displacement making Murad invincible with large damage output for nuke potential
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates provide burst damage with invincibility component
skill_comparison.difference: AOV version emphasizes temporary invincibility more heavily

mappings.overall_notes: 李白/Murad are assassin martial artists with emphasis on dodge/invincibility mechanics. Both feature teleport-based mobility with damage output. AOV Murad emphasizes invincibility windows more heavily. ~80% similarity with invincibility mechanics as key shared feature.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Place marks on targets with skill damage. At 4 marks target explodes taking true damage and getting slowed while hero recovers HP
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Same mark placement mechanic - 4 marks trigger explosion with true damage and slow effect
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical mark-stacking passive with 4-mark threshold
skill_comparison.difference: Minor damage and recovery value differences

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Launch lotus orb as boomerang returning to caster, both directions dealing same damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Launch beam of light dealing damage forward then flashing previous area again for same damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are ranged AoE attacks with dual-damage mechanic (forward and return)
skill_comparison.difference: HOK uses boomerang return, AOV uses light flash mechanic - different visual/mechanical execution

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Dash to direction, if enemies near end of dash launch three projectiles to nearby enemies dealing damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar dash with projectile launch to nearby enemies
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical dash-with-projectile mechanic
skill_comparison.difference: Number and pattern of projectiles may differ

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Massive AoE ultimate with multiple projectile waves dealing magic damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Ultimate dance/movement ability with area damage component
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are mobile mage ultimates with AoE damage and dancing/movement theme
skill_comparison.difference: Damage pattern and area coverage implementation differs

mappings.overall_notes: 貂蝉/Diao Chan are mobile mage/assassins with mark-stacking passives and dance-like mobility. Both build marks to explosive payoff. Nearly identical core mechanics with ~85% similarity. Both excel at magical burst with high mobility.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive grants 1 stack per active skill hit on enemies, at max 5 stacks summon prisms to attack nearby enemies
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar stacking mechanic building toward summon trigger
skill_comparison.similarity: Both feature stacking passive leading to summon mechanics
skill_comparison.difference: Summon type and behavior differs (prisms vs other entities)

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Fire 3 prisms in cone-shaped area dealing damage to enemies hit
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar prism-based projectile attack in area pattern
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical prism-launching skill 1
skill_comparison.difference: Area pattern and damage values vary slightly

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Core displacement skill - only main movement ability allowing repositioning and combo setup
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Stun missile that explodes on contact or missile shot that stuns
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are key utility skills for positioning/control
skill_comparison.difference: HOK emphasizes displacement movement, AOV emphasizes crowd control stun

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Spirit Bomb at target dealing massive magic damage, 80% cooldown reduction if eliminates enemy hero
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Charge ultimate entering fox form, changing abilities, gaining untargetable status with armor/magic defense buffs and area damage in path
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are powerful ultimates with game-changing mechanics
skill_comparison.difference: HOK focuses on burst with reset mechanics, AOV emphasizes form transformation and defensive buff

mappings.overall_notes: 诸葛亮/Liliana are strategic mages with different emphasis - HOK Kongming is burst-oriented with cooldown reset potential, AOV Liliana emphasizes defensive transformation and positioning flexibility. ~78% core similarity but different playstyles.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Summoned magical swords circle around dealing damage per second to nearby enemies, basic attacks consume swords for enhanced damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Nearly identical circling sword mechanic with per-second damage dealing to nearby enemies
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical magic sword summoning passive
skill_comparison.difference: Minor differences in sword behavior and damage values

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Dash attack dealing physical damage in area, basic defensive/offensive tool
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar dash strike ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical dash strike skill 1
skill_comparison.difference: Slight variations in range and area of effect

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Sweep attack dealing area damage, applies crowd control or buff
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar sword sweep area damage ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical sweep attack mechanic
skill_comparison.difference: Secondary effects may vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Leap to target enemy stabbing swords creating blast knocking up nearby enemies, leaving damaging ground mark
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Nearly identical leap-stab ultimate creating ground damage zone with knockup effect
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical ultimate mechanics - leap to target with knockup and persistent ground damage
skill_comparison.difference: Minor tuning differences in damage and duration

mappings.overall_notes: Arthur heroes in both games are nearly IDENTICAL - same sword-summoning warrior playstyle with magical sword mechanics. Both leap-stab ultimates with knockup and ground damage. ~95% similarity makes them nearly perfect counterparts with minimal differences.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive that enhances magic damage output and provides buff enhancement mechanics
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar magic damage amplification passive
skill_comparison.similarity: Both enhance magical damage output through passive
skill_comparison.difference: Specific mechanics of buff application vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Launch multiple magic projectiles dealing area damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar multi-projectile barrage attack
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical multi-projectile damage skill
skill_comparison.difference: Number and pattern of projectiles may vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Grant shield buff to allies or self providing damage protection
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar protective shield ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical shield granting support ability
skill_comparison.difference: Shield scaling and duration varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate area damage ability with large AoE and crowd control component
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate AoE damage with control effect
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates are AoE magic damage with crowd control
skill_comparison.difference: Specific crowd control type and damage pattern varies

mappings.overall_notes: 安琪拉/Angela-Krixi are magical support mages with shield-granting capabilities. Both emphasize magic damage output with ally protection. ~80% similarity with support-focused playstyle in both versions.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Gain increased attack power and defense as health decreases, rewarding aggressive low-health play
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar mechanic where hero becomes stronger at lower health
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical low-health rampage/empowerment passive
skill_comparison.difference: Specific stat bonuses and thresholds vary

skill_comparison.hok_skill_vi: Phương Thiên Họa Kích Huỳnh Vũ
skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Swing weapon dealing area damage to nearby enemies
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar weapon swing area damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical AoE swing attack
skill_comparison.difference: Range and damage values vary

skill_comparison.hok_skill_vi: Phương Thiên Họa Kích Xung Phong
skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Charge forward with weapon dealing damage and crowd control
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar charge ability with damage and CC
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical charge attack
skill_comparison.difference: Crowd control type and damage scaling varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate providing massive damage boost and crowd control immunity for duration, massive AoE damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate with damage boost and temporary immunity effect
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical ultimate with immunity/damage boost component
skill_comparison.difference: Specific immunity duration and damage output varies

mappings.overall_notes: 吕布/Maloch are powerful warriors with rampage mechanics rewarding low-health aggressive play. Both feature weapon-based damage abilities with charge mechanics. ~82% similarity with core rampage passive identical.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Hero gains increased defense and can trigger burst damage effects when conditions are met
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar dragon-themed damage/defense enhancement passive
skill_comparison.similarity: Both have dragon-themed power enhancement passives
skill_comparison.difference: Specific trigger conditions and stat bonuses vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Slash attack dealing physical damage in area
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar dragon-themed slash attack
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical slash damage skill
skill_comparison.difference: Area of effect pattern varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Movement and attack speed buff, provides temporary combat enhancement
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar combat buff ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical buff ability
skill_comparison.difference: Buff duration and stat values vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate dragon-themed ability with large AoE damage and crowd control
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar dragon ultimate with area damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Both are dragon-themed ultimates with AoE damage
skill_comparison.difference: Specific crowd control and damage pattern varies

mappings.overall_notes: 赵云/Zephys are dragon-themed fighters with power-enhancement passives. Both use dragon abilities for slashing damage. ~79% similarity with dragon theme as key shared element. Mechanical implementations differ in specific ways.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive that enhances mobility and provides shadow/clone mechanics for damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar shadow/duplicate mechanic enhancing damage output
skill_comparison.similarity: Both feature shadow/echo mechanics for enhanced damage
skill_comparison.difference: Shadow behavior and damage application varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Quick strike dealing physical damage with possible shadow effect
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar shadow-enhanced strike
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical shadow-based damage skill
skill_comparison.difference: Shadow trigger conditions vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Create shadow clone or dash ability dealing area damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar decoy/clone ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Both use clone/decoy mechanics
skill_comparison.difference: Implementation and behavior of clones differs

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate that deals massive damage with shadow/clone multiplication effect
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate with shadow mechanics dealing heavy damage
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates utilize shadow mechanics for burst damage
skill_comparison.difference: Shadow count and damage distribution varies

mappings.overall_notes: 韩信/Nakroth are assassins specializing in shadow clone mechanics for burst damage. Both emphasize mobility through shadow/echo effects. ~76% similarity with shadow mechanics as core shared feature but different implementation details.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive weapon enhancement providing attack power and defense scaling
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar weapon-based stat enhancement
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical weapon-based passive enhancement
skill_comparison.difference: Scaling values vary slightly

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Slice attack dealing area damage with possible crowd control
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar slice/blade attack
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical slice attack ability
skill_comparison.difference: Crowd control type varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Wide area sweep dealing damage to all enemies in range
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar wide sweep ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical area sweep attack
skill_comparison.difference: Range and damage values vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate with large AoE damage and crowd control, grants temporary stat boost
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate with area damage and buff effect
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates are AoE damage with stat buff component
skill_comparison.difference: Specific buff type and damage pattern varies

mappings.overall_notes: 关羽/Superman are warrior generals with weapon-based mechanics using Chinese weapons (Green Dragon Saber). Both feature sweep attacks and stat-boosting ultimates. ~81% similarity with weapon-enhancement passive as core element.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive that provides stat bonuses to self and nearby allies, leadership-themed
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar aura-based buff to team
skill_comparison.similarity: Both provide team/self buff passive with warrior/leader theme
skill_comparison.difference: Specific stat bonuses and aura radius vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Charge attack dealing physical damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar charge ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical charge attack
skill_comparison.difference: Charge distance and impact varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Defense buff or counter-attack ability
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar defensive ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical defensive/counter ability
skill_comparison.difference: Defense mechanism type varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate that provides major area control and crowd control with potential team buff
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate area control ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates emphasize area control and command mechanics
skill_comparison.difference: Specific crowd control implementation varies

mappings.overall_notes: 曹操/Lu Bu are military leader warriors with team-buff passives and charge-based abilities. Both emphasize leadership and area control. ~75% similarity with leader-theme as key shared element.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive that enhances team stats in area with emperor-themed power
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar imperial/leader buff aura
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical team buff passive aura
skill_comparison.difference: Buff magnitude and area size vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Buff ability granting power to self and team
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar command/buff ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical team buff skill
skill_comparison.difference: Buff duration and type vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Crowd control or protective ability with dominion theme
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar control/protection ability
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical control ability
skill_comparison.difference: Specific CC type varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate with area control and major team buff effect
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate team buff with area control
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates emphasize team empowerment with area effect
skill_comparison.difference: Buff type and duration varies

mappings.overall_notes: 刘邦/Zaniel are support tanks with strong team-buff mechanics and imperial/leader theme. Both focus on empowering allies. ~77% similarity with team-buff mechanics as core shared element.

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Passive shield that triggers periodically protecting against damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar periodic shield passive
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical shield-based passive
skill_comparison.difference: Shield trigger frequency and amount vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Melee attack dealing area damage
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar blade attack
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical melee attack ability
skill_comparison.difference: Range and damage values vary

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Flame-based attack dealing area damage with possible crowd control
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar flame attack
skill_comparison.similarity: Nearly identical flame slash ability
skill_comparison.difference: Crowd control effect varies

skill_comparison.mechanics_hok: Ultimate charge attack with crowd control and shield enhancement
skill_comparison.mechanics_aov: Similar ultimate charge with shield buff
skill_comparison.similarity: Both ultimates are charge-based with defensive component
skill_comparison.difference: Crowd control timing and shield scaling vary

mappings.overall_notes: 程咬金/Tara are axe-wielding tanks with periodic shield passives. Both emphasize defensive mechanics with offensive charge ultimates. ~74% similarity with shield-based playstyle as core element.

summary.research_notes: Mappings based on skill mechanics, cooldown structures, and gameplay roles. Many heroes are nearly identical between the two games due to same developer (TiMi Studios), but have undergone separate development paths since 2022 when AOV stopped creating original heroes. Some heroes like Arthur share 95%+ similarity while others like Li Bai/Murad have diverged more significantly in mechanics despite shared character themes. Vietnamese names provided for Liên Quân Mobile context.
